reason: Successfully verified the agent can use GitHub tool to check authenticated user identity and return the GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with the Super Agent application displaying the sidebar with multiple agents listed.
Clicked on the "QA-20260424-234209-kzi5" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page loaded, showing the agent name and idle status indicator.
Verified agent status is "idle" - Confirmed status is "idle" as shown in the top-right corner of the agent detail page (shown in step2-agent-selected.png screenshot).
Clicked on message input field and typed the required message: "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was successfully entered into the textarea.
Clicked the "Send message" button - The message was sent and the agent transitioned to "working" status, creating a new session titled "GitHub Identity Verification Request".

Waited for GitHub account access card to appear - After 3 seconds, a "Request Connected Account" card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access. The GitHub account was already selected (checked).
Clicked the "Allow Access (1)" button - Access was granted and the agent continued processing. The agent status returned to "working" and requested API permission.
API Request Review card appeared asking "Allow get the authenticated user?" with GitHub GET /user endpoint - The card displayed the API request details with "Deny" and "Allow" buttons.
Clicked the "Allow" button for the API request - A permission menu appeared with options for "Allow Once", "Always allow user", etc. Selected "Allow Once" to proceed.
Agent completed processing after 42 seconds - The agent returned the response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with both tool cards marked as completed (checkmarks visible).

Verified the response includes a GitHub username and took final screenshot - The final screenshot (step7-final-response-with-username.png) clearly shows the agent's response containing the GitHub username "yiw190", confirming successful authentication and identity verification.
